title: Customer.io Customer
description: A customer profile in Customer.io representing a person in your audience with attributes, device information, and segment membership.

email.description: The customer email address used for email messaging.

created_at.description: A UNIX timestamp representing when the customer was first identified.

anonymous_id.description: An anonymous identifier used to associate pre-identification events with this customer.

attributes.description: Custom attributes on the customer profile. These can be any key-value pairs set via the Track or Pipelines APIs.

unsubscribed.description: Whether the customer has unsubscribed from marketing messages.

devices.description: Push notification devices associated with this customer.

CustomerIdentifiers.description: Identifiers used to uniquely reference a customer in Customer.io.

id.description: The primary customer identifier in your system.

email.description: The customer email address, which can serve as a primary identifier.

cio_id.description: The Customer.io internal identifier automatically assigned to each customer.

Device.description: A push notification device associated with a customer.

last_used.description: A UNIX timestamp of when the device was last used.

SegmentMembership.description: A segment that the customer belongs to.
